pairs.label: SAME_STORY
pairs.rationale: Syndicated reports on the same murder investigation.

evidence: Three distinct domains carry the same normalized headline and concrete event.

pairs.label: UNCERTAIN
pairs.rationale: The titles do not establish whether the national/Michigan report and New Mexico cases belong to one outbreak event.

evidence: Both pinned URLs and available structured metadata were reviewed; decisive event identity is absent.
